'''Tirual Construction Holdings''' was a [[Interstellar Stock Exchange/Legends|publicly traded]] company in existence prior to the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], that backed the establishment of the [[Tekshar Falls Casino]] in [[Kuat City]] on [[Kuat]]. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the reigning [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had invested in Tirual Construction Holdings and held subsequent shares in the Tekshar Falls. While visiting the Tekshar Falls [[Casino/Legends|Casino]] in pursuit of [[Jaing Skirata]], Fett reviewed his portfolio and investments in Tirual Holdings, making a personal note to minimize any potential damage to the casino due to his financial interests.<ref name="Sacrifice" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tirual Construction Holdings was first introduced in the novel [[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice|''Sacrifice'']], the fifth entry in the multi-[[Author/Legends|author]] ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series, written by [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[May 29]], [[2007]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
